ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employee's job */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (current or former) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the employee in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the employee (hashed) */,
  " joining_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "leaving_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., employee, HR, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the review category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the review category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the like was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average overall rating for reviews in this department */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Count of reviews submitted for this department */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Unique token for the password reset */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset was requested */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the response is associated with */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the response was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_category_mapping" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the review belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "category_id")
)
